data_minimization.reasoning: The policy explicitly lists the categories of personal information collected (e.g., Account, Food and Activity Diary, Usage Data) and does not include biometric data in these scopes.

collected.policy_snippet: Information Collected from Connected Health Device Data. Certain connected devices, such as heart rate monitors, Continuous Glucose Monitoring devices, activity trackers, exercise equipment, scales, and/or wearables, that integrate with the Services, may allow us to collect Food and Activity Diary Data with your permission.
collected.purpose: To give you the best support, we collect personal information from you along the way to provide you with our Services.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy lists extensive categories of data including sensitive health information without explicitly stating a principle of collecting only what is strictly necessary or defining limits on the scope of collection beyond general service provision.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.
stored.purpose: to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.

shared.policy_snippet: MyFitnessPal shares your information with service providers, business partners, and other third parties to provide you with our Services.
shared.purpose: to provide you with our Services

health_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: The policy explicitly collects sensitive health data such as medications and physiological conditions, which is retained vaguely 'as long as necessary' and shared with third parties including marketing partners. International transfers to the US and other regions are permitted, potentially exposing data to different legal regimes.

collected.policy_snippet: Information related to any physiological conditions; Certain connected devices, such as heart rate monitors, Continuous Glucose Monitoring devices, activity trackers, exercise equipment, scales, and/or wearables, that integrate with the Services, may allow us to collect Food and Activity Diary Data with your permission.
collected.purpose: To provide Services, personalize content and features to your interests and goals, and support health and fitness tracking.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy contains generic claims about collecting personal information but does not provide specific limits or concrete justification for why each type of physiological data is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.
stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the Policy and satisfy legal or reporting requirements.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: The right to request that we delete your personal information (subject to certain exceptions prescribed by applicable law).

shared.policy_snippet: MyFitnessPal shares your information with service providers, business partners, and other third parties to provide you with our Services. We also share your information with marketing and advertising partners to show you relevant content and advertising.
shared.purpose: To provide Services, show relevant content and advertising, and perform business functions on behalf of MyFitnessPal.

physiological_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physiological data including health conditions and data from connected health devices is collected and may be shared with third parties including marketing partners. Data is retained for unspecified periods and may be transferred internationally to countries with different privacy laws.

collected.policy_snippet: Account and Profile Information. This includes your name, email address, general location information (country/zip code), profile image or photo (if you choose to provide one), username and password, date of birth, and sex.
collected.purpose: To create an account and profile to provide Services.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy lists broad categories of physical data collected without explicit statements limiting collection to only what is strictly necessary or defining concrete boundaries.

stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the Policy including legal or reporting requirements.

shared.purpose: To provide Services, show relevant content and advertising.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data such as body measurements, photos, and location is collected and shared with third parties including advertising partners. Data is transferred internationally to the US and other regions, increasing exposure to different privacy laws.

collected.policy_snippet: This includes your: Dietary habits; ... Fitness level, activity, and goals (e.g. weekly goals or habits like eat more protein); Lifestyle information (e.g., sleeping data); ... actions that you take while using the Services, information about how you interact with the Services, including the frequency and duration of your activities, information about the links you click, and other information about how you use the Services.
collected.purpose: To provide Services, show relevant ads and content, improve quality of Services, and personalize content and features to interests and goals.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Behavioral data including habits and app usage is collected and shared with marketing partners for advertising, with vague retention periods ("as long as necessary") and potential international transfers to jurisdictions with different privacy laws.
